title: Create: Synthetic Pressure
description: An updated remake of Create: High Pressure by Aweeri.
body:
**An updated remake of Create: High Pressure by Aweeri.**

## Overview
Create: Synthetic Pressure gives you a balanced, automation-driven alternative to generate diamonds without having to go mining. This addon was originally designed by [Aweeri](https://modrinth.com/user/Aweeri) with survival progression in mind, and aims to be challenging and rewarding without bloat and without being too overpowered. The [original mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-high-pressure) has not been updated in over a year, so I decided to update it myself.

## New Items and Recipes
**Graphite Powder**

You can blast any kind of coal or charcoal in a blast furnace or on a belt to create graphite powder.

![Any kind of coal or charcoal can be blasted into graphite powder.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ce5c54b106d565f937ea96496c9549ac82cf669.png)

**Graphite**

You can compact graphite powder in a heated basin for a 50% chance to create graphite.

![Graphite powder can be compacted into graphite.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4977be4796f5fc9665c5a7a88b91d9afb3434152.png)

**Impure Diamond**

You can compact graphite in a superheated basin for an extremely small chance to get a diamond, or an 80% chance to get an impure diamond.

![Graphite can be compacted for a tiny chance for diamonds.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b06ab298830f818516754fc955fc1a451ff2ede.png)

- - -

**Recycling and Multiplication**

You can recycle impure diamonds by processing them in crushing wheels, which returns a chance at getting gravel, graphite powder, and experience nuggets.

![Impure diamonds can be recycled for gravel, graphite powder, and experience nuggets.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81f62f08495b8f539b90fa4a8abf5149d17d08b1.png)

You can multiply netherrack by mixing it with gravel and lava in a basin, allowing for easier automation of blaze cakes.

![Netherrack can be multiplied by mixing it with gravel and lava in a basin.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68c78b9ab3f8edbd1036e159b61838cb9964e774.png)

- - -

**Additional Notes**
- Balancing: Diamonds are still rare, but are now renewable.
- Automation-driven: Built with Create in mind.
- Standalone-friendly: The mod has no dependencies beyond Create.

**Attribution**
- Original mod by [Aweeri](https://modrinth.com/user/Aweeri). Please support her on [Ko-Fi](https://ko-fi.com/aweeri)!
- MIT License, just like the original.
- Bug Testing: [AbyssalCJ](https://modrinth.com/user/AbyssalCJ)
- Updated and maintained by myself.
